forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Cloud clearing. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy.Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 3:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Sunny morning. Medium chance of showers in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending northerly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Sunny day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 31.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the evening. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.

Cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the evening. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 31 to 36.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 32 to 37.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 36.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 36.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 36.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the day then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.
